summary: Implemented the 7 novel commands + products get + seller listings against the public catalog search JSON and a self-populating local SQLite store.
reason: Generator scaffolds novel-feature command stubs; the search/store-backed logic (deals/value/compare/watch/since/price-history/seller stats/seller listings/products get) is hand-authored in internal/cli/daraz_common.go and the per-command files.
